top_risks.title: Behavior Drift
top_risks.detail: The follow-up may change behavior beyond the user's requested fix if the source answer mixed diagnosis and implementation.

top_risks.title: Local Context Risk
top_risks.detail: Review the existing logic in internal/repoctx/repoctx.go before applying broad changes.

missing_checks: Confirm the exact file and symbol names before editing.
Check whether the clipboard answer assumed code that no longer exists.
Run the smallest regression test that reproduces the original problem.
